basic_details.job_title: B.K.M. Govt. HSS Kulana Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: B.K.M. Govt. Higher Secondary School (B.K.M. Govt. HSS Kulana) Guest Faculty (Arts Stream) Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 06 vacancies have been announced through the B.K.M. Govt. HSS Kulana Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Odia): Master's Degree in Odia with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Guest Faculty (English): Master's Degree in English with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Guest Faculty (History): Master's Degree in History with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Guest Faculty (Political Science): Master's Degree in Political Science with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Guest Faculty (Economics): Master's Degree in Economics with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi. Guest Faculty (Odia Optional): Master's Degree in Odia Optional with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.400/- per class/lecture to a ceiling of maximum Rs.20,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Rs.400/- per class/lecture to a ceiling of maximum Rs.20,000/- per month

selection_process: Career Assessment Teaching Experience Basic Computer Knowledge in Computer Application Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for B.K.M. Govt. HSS Kulana Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty posts at B.K.M. Govt. HSS Kulana is 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, along with a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty positions is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs.400/- per class/lecture, with a maximum ceiling of Rs.20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the filled application form along with required documents to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Guest Faculty posts across various subjects.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different subjects for which Guest Faculty are being recruited?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Guest Faculty in Odia, English, History, Political Science, Economics, and Odia Optional.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Career Assessment, Teaching Experience, Basic Computer Knowledge in Computer Application, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
